steps.title: Find the data that best emphasizes size
steps.content: To “emphasize the size” most effectively, use specific measurements rather than just saying “large.” Note 3 provides this data: the sculpture is “roughly 6 feet wide and 12 feet tall.”

steps.title: Match the concrete dimensions
steps.content: D directly includes those measurements—”stretches roughly 6 feet wide and 12 feet tall”—which effectively conveys the sculpture's size. Choices A and C only use vague language like “large”; B ignores size. That matches choice D — D is correct.
